_comment: Real class mapping from app1.py FOOD_TO_ID (8 classes). eating=true for food intake; app1.py's rule: everything except Silence/Talking/Drinking is eating. NOTE: the 8-class model is 'nuna_production_model_with_weighted_loss_16_20' — the currently-loaded 6-class nuna_production_model does NOT match this; load the 8-class model via NUNA_MODEL_DIR.
